description: Create comprehensive garden system design document

findings.designApproach: Victory Garden - evolution stages from seedling to ecosystem
keyMechanics: Growth Energy system (no cap, pauses but never regresses)
6 evolution stages (Seedling → Sprout → Growing → Thriving → Blooming → Ecosystem)
Category plants (7 types matching task categories)
findings.scalabilitySolution: Visual compression - flowers → bouquets → patterns → density

nextStep: Create prototype for Stage 1-2 (Seedling to Sprout)
